project_area: Long-term care services and support for older adults and adults with disabilities
demographic_requirements: Eligible applicants must be 65 years of age or older, be at risk of nursing home placement, and meet financial eligibility criteria. Programs also serve adults with disabilities.
eligibility_summary: Services are available to Connecticut residents who are older adults (65+) or adults with disabilities, meet financial eligibility criteria, and require assistance with critical needs such as bathing, dressing, eating, medication management, or toileting. Some programs are limited to Medicaid recipients.
